title: Animal Garden - Red Panda
description: Adds tamable red pandas into the game with many different type of animations to make them and your world more lively.
body:
Adds tamable red pandas into the game with many different type of animations to make them and your world more lively.

 

After you tame them their health increases from 8 to 25, you can switch their behavior when clicking on them with any item that is not a bamboo.

Its behavior is Wandering, Sitting, Following (in this order)

When you put them in following mode it will give out a little bark to let you know that they are ready to follow you.

 

By default they spawn in jungle, sparse jungle and bamboo jungle.
(In forge you can change this and other spawn settings by editing the json files in the data -> biome tags and biome modifier folders or via resource pack and in fabric there is a config file for it)

 

 

There are 2 variants in the game.

The default and the Himalayan Red panda which is a bit smaller and has a little change in colors.

And the babies have a grayer color.

 

You can tame, breed or heal them with bamboo.

Idle sounds are from minecraft dungeons.

 

 ![bg](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/7mT3pD13/images/ce7e7a4d9bd6c6d6f901c834ad0b003a326969d7.gif)

Mod currently supports

**Forge 26.1.x | 1.21.11 | 1.21.10 | 1.21.9 | 1.21.8 | 1.21.7 | 1.21.6 | 1.21.4 | 1.21.1 | 1.20.1**

**Fabric 26.1.x | 1.21.11 | 1.21.10 | 1.21.9 | 1.21.8 | 1.21.7 | 1.21.6 | 1.21.5 | 1.21.4 | 1.21.1**

**Neoforge 26.1.x | 1.21.11 | 1.21.10 | 1.21.9 | 1.21.8 | 1.21.7 | 1.21.6 | 1.21.4 | 1.21.1**
